entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., the target crop for genetic transformation

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASE
entities.description: Diseases caused by fungi that the research aims to provide resistance against

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO FUNGAL DISEASE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand fungal diseases

entities.name: RICE CHITINASE GENE
entities.description: A gene from rice used to confer resistance to fungal disease in pigeonpea

entities.name: PCAMBIA 1302:RCHIT
entities.description: The plasmid vector used to carry the rice chitinase gene

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM-MEDIATED METHOD
entities.description: The technique used to deliver the gene into the plant cells

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM
entities.description: The genus of bacteria used as a vector for gene transfer

entities.name: COTYLEDONARY NODE EXPLANTS
entities.description: The specific plant tissue used for transformation

entities.name: HYGROMYCIN
entities.description: An antibiotic used in the selection media to identify transformed plants

entities.name: MOLECULAR TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used to confirm the integration and expression of the gene

entities.name: T0 AND T1 TRANSGENICS
entities.description: The first and second generations of genetically transformed plants
